message.msgstr: Warning: It may take a few seconds before changes are applied. Ethernet connections will be lost for a moment.
message.msgstr_en: Warning: It may take a few seconds before changes are applied. Ethernet connections will be lost for a moment.

message.msgstr: Warning: VigorAP Management may acquire a different IP address. You will need to contact with your network administrator.
message.msgstr_en: Warning: VigorAP Management may acquire a different IP address. You will need to contact with your network administrator.

message.msgstr: Please select the schedule to be deleted.
message.msgstr_en: Please select the schedule to be deleted.
